core.label: Elm Fundamentals
core.description: Functional frontend programming with zero runtime errors.

topics.label: Installation & elm reactor
topics.description: Install Elm and use elm reactor for development. Elm compiles to JavaScript.

topics.label: Types & Values
topics.description: Int, Float, String, Bool, List, Tuple, Record. Elm is statically typed with inference.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: All functions are pure — same input always gives same output. No side effects.

topics.label: The Elm Architecture (TEA)
topics.description: Model-Update-View pattern. The foundation of every Elm application.

topics.label: Pattern Matching
topics.description: case...of for exhaustive matching on custom types.

topics.label: Custom Types
topics.description: Sum types (tagged unions) for modeling state precisely. Make impossible states impossible.

topics.label: Commands & Subscriptions
topics.description: Cmd for side effects (HTTP, random), Sub for listening (WebSocket, time).

topics.label: JSON Decoding
topics.description: Decode JSON with type-safe decoders. No runtime errors from unexpected data.
